description: Centralized LLM provider + embedding model configuration via harness/providers.py and ~/.myenvs/ema_nlp.env

tasks.title: harness/providers.py — configure_embed_model() + get_llm_model()
acceptance_criteria: Reads EMA_LLM_MODEL, EMA_EMBED_MODEL, EMA_EMBED_PROVIDER from env (via config.py dotenv load)
configure_embed_model: huggingface provider → HuggingFaceEmbedding; openai provider → OpenAIEmbedding (guarded import)
get_llm_model: returns override if given, else EMA_LLM_MODEL, else 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'

tasks.title: Wire providers.py into harness modules (embed, judge, rerankers, run_eval, app)
acceptance_criteria: harness/run_eval.py: fallback model strings use providers.get_llm_model(); embed setup calls providers.configure_embed_model(name)

tasks.title: Update docs/SETUP.md with env var reference
acceptance_criteria: docs/SETUP.md has a section listing EMA_LLM_MODEL, EMA_EMBED_MODEL, EMA_EMBED_PROVIDER with defaults and examples
Example shows switching to a lighter embed model (bge-small) and a different LLM tier
